rationale: The page contains specific information about the Rashtriya Vigyan Puraskar, including its categories and a notable recipient, Prof. Jayant Vishnu Narlikar. This is useful content for generating questions on current affairs related to science and culture.
cleanedText:
4.8. RASHTRIYA VIGYAN PURASKAR
Why in the News?
Government announced Rashtriya Vigyan Puraskar 2025, highest recognition for outstanding and inspiring contributions by scientists, technologists, and innovators in diverse fields of science, technology, and technology-led innovation.
About Rashtriya Vigyan Puraskar
- Conferred under four categories:
- Vigyan Ratna (VR): for lifetime achievements & contributions in any field of science and technology.
- Vigyan Shri (VS): to recognize distinguished contributions in any field of science and technology.
- Vigyan Yuva-Shanti Swarup Bhatnagar (VY-SSB): for recognizing & encouraging young scientists.
- Vigyan Team (VT): for exceptional team work in science and technology.
- Prof. Jayant Vishnu Narlikar (Physics) was awarded Vigyan Ratna (VR) Posthumously.
- He co-developed Hoyle–Narlikar theory of gravity – an alternative to Einstein’s general relativity and a counterpoint to the widely accepted Big Bang model.
